room.caption: [G2-ForestP6b] Because the upside down version was hard to get right.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(10) secondaryLocCheck(2,6)
background_visible[0]=0
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backZeldaForestTrees backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollow.yMoveScale=0.9 backFollow.depth=1499999
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundStatic) backFollow.backSet=backZForF6b backFollow.depth=1100000
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4MainA) sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(209) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 if global.mySegmentCheck[0]=0 { newMapX=944 newMapY=672 toRoom=rLink2_PalaceF_2a } else if global.mySegmentCheck[0]=1 { newMapX=944 newMapY=176 toRoom=rLink2_PalaceF_2b } image_xscale=4 newArrowPosX=24 newArrowPosY=16
stringToShow="There's an item here on the unflipped version.#Magically, it's not in this version.#-Dylan, the Poe" signSize=3

bwBack=tileZeldaForest bwLeft=160 bwTop=64 bwWidth=32 bwHeight=32 image_xscale=2 image_yscale=2
gameProgCheck=string_char_at(global.gameGate2Prog,2) if gameProgCheck!="0" {instance_destroy()}

bwBack=tileZeldaForest bwLeft=160 bwTop=64 bwWidth=32 bwHeight=32 image_xscale=2 image_yscale=2
gameProgCheck=string_char_at(global.gameGate2Prog,2) if gameProgCheck!="0" {instance_destroy()}
